title: Workhorse Joins FedEx Forward Service Provider Summit Showcasing W56
text: Workhorse joined FedEx as a Presidential Exhibitor at the Forward Service Provider Summit, showcasing its W56 Electric Vehicle. The company's participation demonstrated strong vehicle performance and capabilities to FedEx's service provider network. Following the summit, Workhorse received multiple purchase orders from FedEx delivery partners, with FedEx placing a first order for 15 W56 step vans to grow its zero-tailpipe emission fleet. Additionally, Workhorse secured orders from three independent service providers for seven W56 electric step vans within 30 days of the summit. The W56's impressive efficiency of 31 MPGe compared to 7 MPG for traditional delivery trucks makes it an attractive option for fleet operators seeking to reduce emissions and operating costs.
